block_01: Paisa jama karne keliye ek naya surakshit tarika
block_03: Bitcoin utsahiyo ko khushi ki kabar IQ Option bitcoin ke zariya deposit sveekar kar rahe hain. Ab aap apka crypto wallet se bitcoin ke zariya paisa jama kar sakte hain. Ab IBAN ya antarashtriy transactions ke swift codes ke koi katinayiya nahi honge. Achi khabar hai na?
block_05: Apka IQ Option account mein login karein aur Deposit button par click karein.
block_06: Ab aap Bitcoin method aur rakam chunein, aur Proceed to Payment par click karein.
block_07: Ab apka BTC wallet ki address dalein jaha agar avashyakata hota to ham refund ki paisa bhej sakte hain.
block_08: Ab aap deposit ki details check karein, box mein jo code diya hai vo copy karein, aur iss code ko deposit ke waqt receipient address ke jagah dalein.
block_09: Ho gaya. Code ban gaya hai, aur transaction pura ho gaya hai. Apna pehla bitcoin deposit karne keliye taiyar hain?
block_11: Aap abhi tak bitcoin nahi kharida hai?
block_13: Account banayein aur verify karayein koi prasidh cyrptocurrency exchange par, jaise Kraken, Coinbase, or Bittrex;
block_14: Bitcoin account par rakam dalein fiat currency ke zariya (iska anudesh apko cryptocurrency exchange wale denge);
block_15: Apka account surakshit karein 2FA chalu karke taki apka account hacking se bachein.
block_16: Chetavani: Kripaya dhyan dein ki 3rd-party exchange par kiya gaye sabhi prakar ke sanyavyvahar apke jimmedari par kiya jate hain. Inn sanyavyavaharo ki koi jimmedari IQ Option nahi leta hai.
